chunks.text: Now let us understand what does it mean by decision problem and what does it mean by optimization problem.

chunks.text: Let us look at the procedure for proving a graph problem as NP-hard.

chunks.title: NP-Hard Graph Problem - Clique Decision Problem - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If we call any problem as L2 then we have to prove that problem L2 is NP-hard.

chunks.title: NP-Hard Graph Problem - Clique Decision Problem - Abdul Bari
